verses.text: “Mi khatpeuh teci pang dingin a kisap ciangin a muhsa a theihsa thute genloin a ip leh, amah in tua mawhna pua ding hi

“Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in gamlak ganhing nin a sisa hita leh inn ganhing nin a sisa hita leh a bokvak a nin ganhing a sisa hita leh, a muhlohin a nin khat peuhpeuh lawngkha-in amah a nin a suah leh, a mawh hi ding hi
“Tua ahih kei leh amah in mihing nitna hita leh, muloin a lawn'khak leh, a theih ciangin a mawh hi ding hi

“Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in a sia bawl ding hita leh a pha bawl ding hita leh mite a kiciam theih ngei kiciamna nam khat peuhpeuh ama kam tawh a theihlohin a kiciampak khak leh, a theih ciangin hihte khat peuhpeuhah a mawh hi ding hi
“Hihte khat peuhpeuhah mi khat a mawh ciangin, amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding a

mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuhon pan ahi a, keelhon pan ahi zongin a nu khat peuhpeuh tuu hita leh keel hita leh, a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin Topa' tungah biakna paipih ding a, siampipa in a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding hi

“Ahih hangin amah in tuuno khat a piak zawh kei leh a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin Topa' tungah biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin, khat khialhna hanga biakna, a khat meihal biakna dingin paipih ding hi
Amah in siampipa tungah tuate paipih ding a, siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna ding pen pia masa ding hi. Amah in a ngawng panin a lu heek ding a, ahih hangin heeksatlo ding hi
Amah in khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat biakna tau pangah theh ding a, biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng taaksak ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi
Tua ciangin amah in ngeina kip om bangin meihal biakna dingin a khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi

“Ahih hangin amah in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin a piak zawh kei leh, amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin a biakna-in annel lawh khat, khialhna hanga biakna dingin paipih ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahih manin amah in tua sungah sathau khahlo ding a, paknamtui zong hello ding hi
Amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding a, siampipa in phawkna-in khutdim khat la-in Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi
Tua bangin siampipa in hihte khat peuhpeuh a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi. An tawh biakna-a mah bangin a omlai teng siampipa-a' ding ahi hi,” a ci hi.

“Mi khatpeuh in theihlohna hangin thu palsatin Topa' na a siangtho khat peuhpeuhah a khialh leh, a mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuhon sung panin a sitbaanglo tuutal khat, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel-in nangmah in a man sehin, amah in Topa' kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi

Amah in a siangtho na a hih khialhna-ah lohkikna zong bawl ding a, seh nga-ah khat gawm behin siampipa tungah pia ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi
“Hihlo ding, ci-in Topa' thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in hihin a khialh leh, a theihlohna hang hita leh zong, amah a mawh hi veve-in, ama mawhna mah pua ding hi

Tuuhon lak pan a sitbaanglo tuutal khat, a manzah ding nangmah in seh in la, amah in mawhna hanga biakna dingin siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi. Theihlohna hanga ama gamtatnasa khialhna hangin siampipa in ama-a' ding kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi
Tua pen Topa' tungah khial ahih manin mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi,” a ci hi.
